title: The Obscura
move_pattern: Starts with Illusion (used only at the start of combat). Then randomly cycles through Piercing Gaze, Wail, and Hardening Strike, never repeating the same move twice in a row.
notes: Illusion is used only once at the start of combat and summons a Parafright ally. Wail applies 3 Strength to all of The Obscura's allies on the field (including the summoned Parafright). Note: the source code names this move SAIL_MOVE (apparent typo for WAIL_MOVE), but localization correctly labels it Wail.
